title: Ubiquiti UVC-G3-FLEX - UniFi Video Camera G3 Flex
category: Ubiquiti / Cameras, security / IP cameras / Turret
description: The UniFi Video Camera G3 Flex features a wide angle lens and 1080p video performance for expanded surveillance coverage Mounting options include desktop, wall or pole mount for both indoor and outdoor installations. The infrared LEDs and automatic IR cut filter provide high.quality day and night monitoring The device can be powered via POE 802.3af, the AC adapter is not included. Motion detection is also included, so there is no need for continuous recording, which can save a lot of storage capacity 1080p Full HD, 25 FPS EFL 4 mm / 2.0 Wide-Angle Lens 802.3af PoE Built-in Microphone Desktop, Wall or Pole Mount Adjustable lens and swivel base for vertical and horizontal viewing angle adjustments Managed by UniFi Protect software Device (2) Holders Outdoor cover Security screw (3) Screws and screw anchors (2) Zip Ties
